name: Event Channel Managarr
description: Automates channel visibility by hiding channels without events and showing those with events, based on EPG data and channel names. Optionally manages dummy EPG for channels without real EPG.
author: PiratesIRC

fields.label: 📍 Scope
fields.description: Which channels this plugin monitors and how it identifies them.

fields.label: 🎯 Hide Rules
fields.description: Priority-ordered rules that decide which channels to hide.

fields.label: 🎭 Duplicates
fields.description: How to handle channels whose events collide.

fields.label: 🔌 EPG Management
fields.description: Optional automation for EPG assignment on visibility changes and a managed dummy EPG for channels without real EPG.

fields.label: ⏰ Scheduling & Export
fields.description: Scheduled runs and CSV export options.

fields.label: ⚙️ Advanced
fields.description: Performance and pacing controls for large channel profiles.

actions.label: Validate Configuration
actions.description: Test and validate all plugin settings

actions.label: Update Schedule
actions.description: Save settings and update the scheduled run times

actions.label: Dry Run (Export to CSV)
actions.description: Preview which channels would be hidden/shown without making changes

actions.label: Run Now
actions.description: Immediately scan and update channel visibility based on current EPG data

confirm.message: This will apply visibility changes and (if enabled) attach/detach managed EPG. Continue?

actions.label: Remove EPG from Hidden Channels
actions.description: Remove all EPG data from channels that are disabled/hidden in the selected profile

confirm.message: This will CLEAR EPG data from every hidden channel in the selected profile. Cannot be undone by this plugin. Continue?

actions.label: Clear CSV Exports
actions.description: Delete all CSV export files created by this plugin

confirm.message: This will delete every CSV file in /data/exports created by this plugin. Continue?

actions.label: Cleanup Orphaned Tasks
actions.description: Remove any orphaned Celery periodic tasks from old plugin versions

confirm.message: This removes orphaned Celery periodic tasks left by older plugin versions. Continue?

actions.label: Check Scheduler Status
actions.description: Display scheduler thread status and diagnostic information
